turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: My kitchen is on fire! I got out. My husband is still inside!

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Sixty-two Halston Ave. Single story, brown roof. His name is Ray, he's sixty-five.

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: Firefighters are on the way. Is he mobile?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: He uses a walker. He was in the back bedroom when I ran out!

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: Stay back. Don't go in. Which side is the bedroom?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Left side of the house. Window faces the yard. Hurry, the smoke is everywhere!

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: Crew is one minute out. Wave them to the left side.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I see lights. I'm waving. Please get him out!
